name: Skip — push my own layout via Studio
recommendedFor: Anyone planning to design their own dashboard in Studio.
description: Start fresh — build it in Studio

name: Track Day
recommendedFor: Track / time-attack drivers who need lap timer, gear and fluid temps at a glance.
description: Lap timer + gear + water/oil + battery + RPM bar — designed for session driving

name: Drift
recommendedFor: Drift cars with steering-angle / lateral-G / handbrake sensors plumbed into CAN.
description: WIP — placeholder layout (steering / handbrake / lateral-G signals not in catalog yet, edit in Studio)

name: Cruise
recommendedFor: Street / road-trip use where speed + fuel + battery is all you need.
description: Speed + fuel + battery — minimal road layout (WIP: odometer pending signal catalog, edit in Studio)

name: Dyno
recommendedFor: Tuners running engine pulls — RPM front-and-centre with boost / AFR / ECT / TPS / IAT bars.
description: RPM arc + boost arc + AFR / ECT / TPS / IAT bars — tuning cell layout
